name: Neopolitan: Stayed Behind
description:
Neo wanted Ruby dead. You convinced her to stay in the ever after. Now what, wise guy?

Sorry for the delay. Was going through some shit, dealt with it, now I’m back, nothing more to it. Expect a bot a week, at least.

This was a request by @Tah7. Sorry for the shorter intro.

Requests are most definitely open. Either make your requests in the comments, or make your requests HERE: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeIP5gItOSA1zgYXxWFcgJULztmsUCjkp5hkWsR6Q2dlw_IBQ/viewform?usp=header
creator: Lilith3per
